---
title: "Mini-project2"
author: "Isimbi"
format: html
editor: visual
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r}
library(httr2)
library(tidyverse)
library(jsonlite)

# 1. Create the request
req <- request("https://www.fruityvice.com/api/fruit/all") 

# 2. Perform the request and parse the JSON
resp <- req %>% 
  req_perform() %>% 
  resp_body_json()

# 3. Turn the list into a tidy tibble
fruit_data <- tibble(data = resp) %>%
  unnest_wider(data) %>%
  unnest_wider(nutritions) # Flatten the nested nutrition list

print(fruit_data)
```
